C[glubo: I think that this is relatively small move and there are much bigger (saving Q16, invasion in lower left...) but it somewhat forces my move, so why not
C[glubo: Rather submissive move, think about O2 at least, or playing elsewhere (lower left, centre or top right)
C[glubo: This seems to me as move withouth ambition, if You want to reduce my territory, what about somewhere around K14, J5, G4 or N12
C[glubo: This move seems little bit meaningless to me. There are much bigger moves (K13, around M9...)
C[glubo: I can't say that N6, M6 were bad moves, but watch how You made me play where I wanted, I have now nice wall enclosing big territory...
C[glubo: Also I can't say that this is a mistake, but I feel better about N9/M9
C[glubo: I like more N9 and to leave this move as reaction to white P8
C[glubo: This move secures about three points, I think, that playing somewhere J15, or J13 is worth much more
C[glubo: Also rather small move in my eyes, I have sente after your L9, I would play somewhere around F-H 12-15

C[glubo: B-G12 feels premature -- it's endgame move and you are strengthening W upper right.
C[glubo: Cut at C5 is neccesary, letting white connect is bad.
C[glubo: Little bit hopeless chase, in similar situations it is often better to use less contact play for B -- contact play strengten white here.
